hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_desc: Walk a colleague through steps on a shared screen with the imperative -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Giving & Following Instructions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 14 -- Giving & Following Instructions

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am calling about the shipment file. Listen, it is easy. First, open the trading folder on the shared drive. Then, click on the file called Colombia. Do not save it yet, please. Scroll down to the new dates and check them. After that, type your name at the bottom and save the file. If something looks wrong, do not change it. Just call me back and we will fix it together. Thank you so much. Talk soon.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for the steps. I did it. First, I opened the trading folder and I clicked on the Colombia file. Then I scrolled down and I checked the new dates. They look good. I typed my name and I saved the file. One quick thing: please do not send it to the supplier yet. Let's review it together on our call tomorrow first. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: First, open the folder on the shared drive. Then, click on the right file. Next, scroll down and check the dates. After that, type your name and save the file. Finally, do not send it yet, call me to review it together.
